mapper.select: select paper_id, paper_name, paper_type, course_name, rule_desc, question_count, status, avg_score, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from practice_papers where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false

select count(1) from practice_papers
and deleted = false
and (paper_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or course_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
and status = #{status}
mapper.update: update practice_papers set paper_name = #{paperName}, paper_type = #{paperType}, course_name = #{courseName}, rule_desc = #{ruleDesc}, question_count = #{questionCount}, status = #{status}, avg_score = #{avgScore}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where paper_id = #{paperId} and deleted = false
